title: CoworkerProfile
description: Profile for a coworker to help the agent make collaboration and communication recommendations

areas_of_expertise.description: Topics, domains, or skills this person is strong in

projects_involved.description: Project IDs this person is involved in

communication_style.description: Notes on how they prefer to communicate (e.g. async, direct, formal)

typical_availability.description: When they are usually reachable, e.g. 'Mornings AEST, slow to reply Fridays'

notes.description: Any other context about working with this person

involve_when.description: Situations or task types where the agent should suggest involving this person
